description: Free built-in speech-to-text feature on Google Docs and Slides for iOS and Android, allowing users to dictate text directly without additional apps.
title: Google Voice Typing (Built-in)

description: Built-in Android accessibility features for text-to-speech and voice typing, providing native speech support for users with ADHD on all Android devices.
title: Android Accessibility: Text to Speech

description: An official iOS app for recording conversations to reinforce memory and retention, allowing users to review discussions later and improve understanding of key points in neurodivergent communication.
title: Voice Memos (iOS) - Conversational Recording Tool

description: An AI-powered app that prioritizes tasks and schedules, helping users with ADHD manage time blindness and stay organized, supporting effective conversation preparation and focus.
title: Motion - AI Task Prioritization App

description: Tiimo's official Apple App Store page for iOS users, offering a structured visual planner to help manage ADHD routines and daily tasks.
title: Tiimo Product Page

description: Tiimo's official Google Play Store page for Android users, providing a neurodivergent-friendly daily planner for routine management.
title: Tiimo Android App

description: A highly rated reminder app for ADHD that features auto-snooze, timer functions, and persistent alerts to help users stay on track with tasks, appointments, and deadlines.
title: Due - The Perfect Reminder App

description: Official Apple App Store page for Tiimo, a daily planner and reminder tool designed to help users with ADHD manage their focus, time, and daily habits.
title: Tiimo on the Apple App Store

description: Official Google Play Store page for Tiimo, featuring a neurodivergent-friendly interface with reminders, visual schedules, and habit tracking for ADHD support.
title: Tiimo on Google Play

description: Official Apple App Store page for Focus@Will, a music app engineered to remove frequencies similar to the human voice to help users with ADHD focus and calm their minds on iOS and Android.
title: Focus@Will - Music for Focus

description: Official Apple App Store page for Inflow, a science-backed app designed around cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT) to help manage ADHD symptoms, improve focus, and reduce stress on iOS and Android.
title: Inflow: ADHD Management & CBT

description: Official Apple App Store page for Tiimo, a visual planning app built specifically for ADHD and neurodivergent brains, featuring icon-based schedules and countdown timers for calming time blindness on iOS and Android.
title: Tiimo: Visual Planner for ADHD

description: Official Apple App Store page for Forest, a gamified focus timer that grows virtual trees to help users stay on task and reduce phone distraction, promoting calm and focus for ADHD on iOS and Android.
title: Forest: Focus & Relax Timer

description: Apple App Store page for ClaroSpeak, a versatile text-to-speech iOS app that reads text from various sources out loud, supporting users with ADHD and dyslexia with customizable accents and voices on iOS and Android.
title: ClaroSpeak - Text-to-Speech Tool for Dyslexia and ADHD

description: YouTube channel offering practical video guides, classroom strategies, and tool recommendations specifically designed for supporting students with ADHD in educational settings.
title: How to ADHD - Classroom Tools & Strategies
